title: OpenAI Unveils GPT-5 With Real-Time Reasoning Capabilities
summary: OpenAI has released GPT-5, its most advanced language model to date.
The model features real-time reasoning and can process images, audio, and video simultaneously.
Enterprise pricing starts at $0.01 per 1,000 tokens with volume discounts available.

title: Global Markets Rally as U.S. Inflation Falls to 2.1%, Lowest Since 2021
summary: U.S. Consumer Price Index dropped to 2.1% in May, beating analyst forecasts.
The Dow Jones Industrial Average surged over 450 points following the report.
Federal Reserve officials hinted at possible rate cuts in Q3 2026.

title: Nepal Announces Major Hydropower Export Deal Worth $4.2 Billion With India
summary: Nepal and India signed a landmark 25-year power purchase agreement on Friday.
The deal will export 4,000 MW of hydroelectric power annually to India.
The agreement is expected to generate over $4.2 billion for Nepal's economy.

title: Scientists Achieve Breakthrough in Alzheimer's Treatment Using CRISPR Gene Editing
summary: Researchers at MIT have successfully reversed Alzheimer's symptoms in mice using CRISPR-Cas9.
The therapy targets and disables the gene responsible for amyloid plaque buildup.
Human clinical trials are expected to begin by late 2027 pending FDA approval.

title: 2026 FIFA World Cup: Argentina and Brazil Set for Blockbuster Quarterfinal Clash
summary: Argentina defeated Mexico 3-1 to advance to the World Cup quarterfinals.
Brazil overcame Portugal in a dramatic penalty shootout to set up the clash.
The match is scheduled for June 28 at the AT&T Stadium in Dallas, Texas.

title: Apple's WWDC 2026: iOS 20 Introduces On-Device AI That Works Without Internet
summary: Apple unveiled iOS 20 at WWDC featuring a fully offline AI assistant called Apple Intelligence Ultra.
The AI can draft emails, summarize documents, and generate images entirely on-device.
New neural processing chips in the A20 Bionic enable 40-token-per-second inference.

title: UN Climate Summit Ends With Historic Agreement to Phase Out Coal by 2035
summary: 190 countries signed the Geneva Climate Accord pledging coal phase-out by 2035.
Developing nations will receive $500 billion in green transition funding over 10 years.
Critics argue the timeline is too slow given current global temperature trends.

title: Tesla's Fully Autonomous Robotaxi Fleet Launches in 10 U.S. Cities
summary: Tesla has launched its commercial robotaxi service across 10 major U.S. cities.
Fares start at $0.40 per mile, undercutting Uber and Lyft by over 60%.
The fleet uses Tesla's proprietary FSD v14 neural network with no safety driver required.

title: India's Chandrayaan-4 Lands on Lunar South Pole, Confirms Water Ice Deposits
summary: India's Chandrayaan-4 rover successfully landed at the lunar south pole on Saturday.
Initial drill samples confirm large water ice deposits at depths of 2 to 5 meters.
ISRO scientists say this validates the lunar south pole as a prime base location.

title: Microsoft Acquires Mistral AI for $14 Billion, Expanding European AI Footprint
summary: Microsoft has completed its acquisition of Paris-based Mistral AI for $14 billion.
The deal gives Microsoft access to Mistral's open-weight model portfolio.
European regulators approved the acquisition after Microsoft pledged data sovereignty commitments.

title: Gaza Ceasefire Holds After 72 Hours as Humanitarian Aid Trucks Enter
summary: A fragile ceasefire in Gaza entered its 72nd hour with no major violations reported.
250 aid trucks carrying food, medicine, and fuel crossed into Gaza through the Kerem Shalom crossing.
Negotiators from Qatar and Egypt continue mediating a permanent agreement.

title: Runaway Inflation in Argentina Triggers Mass Protests; Peso Hits Record Low
summary: Argentina's annual inflation reached 289% in May, pushing hundreds of thousands into poverty.
The Argentine peso fell to 1,450 per U.S. dollar, a new all-time low.
Thousands took to the streets in Buenos Aires demanding economic emergency measures.

title: Anthropic Releases Claude 4 With 500,000 Token Context Window
summary: Anthropic has launched Claude 4 with an industry-leading 500,000 token context window.
The model can process entire codebases, books, or hours of audio transcription in a single call.
Benchmarks show Claude 4 outperforming GPT-4o on coding and mathematical reasoning tasks.

title: Novak Djokovic Wins Record 25th Grand Slam Title at Wimbledon
summary: Novak Djokovic claimed his 25th Grand Slam title with a straight-sets Wimbledon victory.
The 39-year-old defeated Carlos Alcaraz 6-4, 6-3, 7-5 in the final.
Djokovic becomes the oldest man to win a Grand Slam in the Open Era.

title: SpaceX Starship Successfully Completes First Crewed Mars Flyby
summary: SpaceX's Starship completed a 14-month crewed mission including a historic Mars flyby.
The 6-person crew captured high-resolution imagery of the Valles Marineris canyon system.
The mission validated life support and propulsion systems for a future Mars landing attempt.

title: China's Economy Grows 5.9% in Q2, Beats Expectations Amid Trade Tensions
summary: China's GDP grew 5.9% in Q2 2026, surpassing analysts' expectations of 5.4%.
Strong domestic consumption and manufacturing output drove the growth.
U.S.-China trade negotiations are ongoing, with tariff discussions expected in July.

title: WHO Declares New H5N2 Bird Flu Strain a Global Health Emergency
summary: The World Health Organization has declared the H5N2 avian influenza strain a public health emergency.
Over 340 confirmed human cases have been reported across 12 countries since April.
Vaccine manufacturers have been authorized to begin emergency production.

title: Ukraine Receives F-35 Fighter Jets From U.S. in Historic Defense Package
summary: The United States has approved a $7 billion defense package including 24 F-35 fighter jets.
Ukraine's Air Force will receive the jets over 18 months with pilot training in Poland.
Russia condemned the decision, calling it a direct escalation.

title: Bitcoin Crosses $200,000 for the First Time Amid Institutional Adoption Wave
summary: Bitcoin surpassed the $200,000 milestone for the first time in its history.
BlackRock and Fidelity BTC ETFs recorded combined inflows of $3.2 billion in a single week.
On-chain analysts attribute the rally to reduced exchange supply and growing sovereign adoption.

title: Meta Launches Horizon OS 3.0: Standalone AR Glasses Now Ship to Consumers
summary: Meta has started shipping its consumer-grade AR glasses powered by Horizon OS 3.0.
The $1,299 device offers 8-hour battery life and seamless integration with Ray-Ban frames.
Over 500 native applications are available at launch, including Zoom, YouTube, and enterprise tools.
